analysis.primary_subject: Interior design featuring woven pendant lights, bamboo elements, and a rustic wall finish

craftsmanship_quality.precision: High - The pendant lights and woven elements show consistent and tight weaving, indicating skilled craftsmanship.
craftsmanship_quality.surface_quality: High - The surfaces of the bamboo and wicker elements are smooth and well-finished, with no visible rough edges.
craftsmanship_quality.attention_to_detail: High - The intricate weaving patterns and the alignment of the pendant lights demonstrate a high level of attention to detail.

portfolio_presentation.accompanying_text: This interior design project showcases the harmonious blend of natural materials like bamboo and wicker, creating a warm and inviting atmosphere. The woven pendant lights and rustic wall finish highlight the beauty of handcrafted elements in modern interior design.
